title: tithymalus firmus
intro: Tithymalus firmus, also known as the Lappi's spurge or Euphorbia lathyris, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Tithymalus firmus include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
